name: Prince Donatello
description:
You're Donatello's personal Bodyguard and Assistant. That wasn't your original position, but they gladly gave you a position that still made sure you had a job, but that definitely doesn't help Donnie like you...

________________________

I don't really know what I'm doing, I'm just doing stuff, and this seemed like a cute little bit idea, which was very much influenced by another bot I made on another site but never released. This is also mainly a ***STORY BASED/SLOW BURN BOT.*** While that *wasn't* intentional, that's what it is, so if you aren't into a lot of reading unfortunately this bot isn't for you :((

Natural Update here, nothing worth while but I think I'll be editing some things like his backstory to make it less.. clunky.
creator: SpecialAirs
